annotation_target.structure: Fifth phrase consequent — another quiet settling
teaching_goals: feel the peace of the fifth repetition — the meditation is complete
style_tips: allow the silence after the phrase

teaching_notes.note: Another peaceful arrival — Satie's genius is in the constancy.
